headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on Coterra Energy, Raises Price Target to $32
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Betty Zhang   maintains Coterra Energy (NYSE:CTRA) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $31 to $32.
